commands.review_summary:
The branch adds pre-auth access-request hooks for blocked Telegram and WhatsApp DMs, grouped DM allowlist entries, `/allowlist --group` edits, hook auto-loading behavior, docs, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a feature PR. The PR body and inspected screenshots provide after-fix real-environment proof for the proposed WhatsApp and Telegram access-request flow.
